function.name: mpm_2d_check_converge_cfl
function.description: Conduct a 2D Material Point Method (MPM) simulation and evaluate cfl convergence by halving cfl. This experiment will conduct both MPM solving and convergence testing in one function. It will return {"refined_parameter": str, "current_value": float, "refined_value": float, "avg_energy_diff": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int, "current_energy_metrics": dict, "refine_energy_metrics": dict}.

nx.description: Grid resolution (number of cells in x-direction)
